structure.missingTopFolder: Add the missing top-level folder, or update the config if this game intentionally omits it.
structure.duplicateFeature: Merge into a single shared folder (e.g. 04_FreeSpins_and_BonusGame) when the feature is shared.
structure.missingSpineSource: Deliver the .spine source alongside every export so we can iterate without round-tripping back to the artist.
structure.referenceLeak: Reference / concept files leak into atlases on export. Move them out of the export folder before delivery.
structure.unknownFolder: Folder is not in the configured layout — confirm it's intentional or update the config.
naming.disallowedChars: Filenames must use only [A-Za-z0-9_-]. Spaces, parens, accents and 'Copy/v2/final' suffixes break asset pipelines.
naming.forbiddenSuffix: Remove versioning/leftover suffixes from delivered filenames.
naming.missingPrefix: Filename is missing the expected prefix for this folder (see config).
naming.spineTripletMismatch: The .json / .atlas / .png triplet must share an identical base name (case-sensitive).
naming.atlasPageMissing: The atlas references a PNG page that doesn't exist on disk with that exact name.
naming.boneTextPrefix: Bones that drive dynamic text must start with TEXT_ or text_ for engine binding.
coverage.symbolAnimMissing: Each symbol skeleton must include the required animation set (idle / land / win, plus anticipation for specials).
coverage.symbolStaticMissing: Export the 1st frame of each symbol as a static PNG for use in pay-tables / UI.
coverage.symbolSizeMissing: Multi-cell symbol size variant is missing (e.g. 1x3 for HP1).
coverage.requiredStaticMissing: A required static asset is missing from the delivery.
coverage.winSeqAnimMissing: Win sequence is delivered as a single skeleton chaining begin/idle/outro per tier — flagged tier is missing.
coverage.previewMissing: Each view needs a 1920x1080 landscape and a 1080x2160 portrait preview PNG.
coverage.fontMissing: Dynamic text bone has no matching font sheet under Fonts/.
spine.versionMismatch: Re-export with the project's target Spine version.
spine.mockTextInExport: Mock text attachment found under a TEXT bone — delete mock-text slots before exporting.
spine.textBoneMissing: Animation expected to host dynamic text has no TEXT_* empty bone — engine has nowhere to attach the value.
spine.symbolsNotInOneProject: All symbol skeletons should live in one .spine project so they share an atlas.
spine.budgetExceeded: Bone / vertex / transform count above warn threshold for this skeleton type.
spine.animationLint: Animation name doesn't match the project's naming lint rules.
spine.attachmentUnresolved: Attachment name in JSON has no matching region in the paired .atlas.
atlas.nonPot: Atlas page is non-power-of-two but its category requires POT.
atlas.sizeCap: Atlas page exceeds the size cap for its category.
atlas.tooManyPages: Skeleton produces too many atlas pages — repack or shrink source assets.
atlas.lowFillRatio: Atlas has lots of empty space — consider reducing page size or increasing region count.
atlas.unusedRegion: Region in .atlas is never referenced by any .json attachment — likely a stale export.
image.nonPot: Asset in a POT category has non-power-of-two dimensions.
image.bgNonCanonical: Background long-edge isn't 2048 or 4096 — use a canonical size.
image.fileTooLarge: PNG file size is above the per-asset cap.
image.axisTooLarge: PNG dimension exceeds the max-axis cap.
bakedText.attachmentName: Attachment name suggests baked text content — replace with a TEXT_ bone driven by the engine.
bakedText.mockInExport: Mock text image left in the export under a TEXT bone.
bakedText.textBoneMissing: Skeleton expects dynamic text but no TEXT_ bone is present.
packing.spineMultipleAtlases: Each .spine export should produce a single atlas — multiple atlases per skeleton suggest a packing issue.
consistency.spineVersionDrift: Spine .json files don't all agree on the same engine version.
consistency.atlasFilterDrift: Atlas filter mode is inconsistent within a category.
